agentNotes.note: Injects this file as an advisory user message (no compliance guarantee); official size target is under 200 lines. Zero-exception rules belong in hooks.
Reads AGENTS.md natively (nearest file wins, 32 KiB cap — this file is 0.0 KiB). Supports AGENTS.override.md for local tweaks.
